description_long: This is a pair of high-top sneakers featuring a combination of brown and black tones, constructed with a mix of matte and slightly textured materials. The shoes have a classic lace-up design with metal eyelets and padded collars for added ankle support. The upper appears to be made of synthetic leather and fabric, while the sole is a dark, likely rubber material with a subtle texture. The tongue and collar are both thickly cushioned, providing comfort and a snug fit. The shoes have a modern, urban style suitable for casual wear in city environments. No visible branding or logos are present on the exterior surfaces.
description: A pair of brown and black high-top sneakers with padded collars, lace-up fronts, and rubber soles, designed for urban casual wear.
description_view_0: Front and side view showing the lace-up design, padded collar, and overall shape of both shoes.
description_view_1: Rear and top view highlighting the thick padded collars and the back heel construction.
description_view_2: Side profile view displaying the smooth transition between the brown upper and black sole, as well as the side panel details.
description_view_3: Front view emphasizing the toe box, lacing system, and the symmetry of the pair.
